name: Guroopia!
short_description: A fun 2D puzzle physics platformer where you manipulate the direction of gravity to complete your mission. You are Marvin, a cool stick-man who is abruptly disturbed by the Dream Wizard. Marvin is told he owes a "dream debt" to the Dream Wizard and will not be allowed to wake up until it's paid!
detailed_description:
A fun 2D puzzle physics platformer where you manipulate the direction of gravity to complete your mission.

You are Marvin, a cool stick-man who is abruptly disturbed by the Dream Wizard. Marvin is told he owes a "dream debt" to the Dream Wizard and will not be allowed to wake up until it's paid! You must complete each level by collecting all the Orbs. Only then will the Dream Wizard allow Marvin to wake up!

Are you clever enough to defeat the Dream Wizard at his own game?

Features:
- 20 levels of puzzle platforming fun
- Original soundtrack
- Innovative gameplay & design
- Special endgame rewards
- Unlockable bonus features
